svg.title: Index product supply chain
svg.desc: Five-tier chain: index providers fan out to three issuers, each creates whitelabelled products, all flow through trading venues to institutions and retail investors.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do index providers like MSCI and SP build indices?')
sendPrompt('How do ETF issuers like Vanguard and BlackRock create index ETFs?')
sendPrompt('How do derivative issuers like CME create index futures and options?')
sendPrompt('How do fund managers license indices to create mutual funds?')
sendPrompt('What are index ETFs and how are they traded?')
sendPrompt('What are index futures and options and how are they structured?')
sendPrompt('What are index mutual funds and structured products?')
sendPrompt('What trading venues and exchanges list index products?')
sendPrompt('How do institutional investors use index ETFs and futures?')
sendPrompt('How do retail investors access index products via brokers?')
